description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and define the variables ARTIFACTS_DIR, BIN_NAME, and GO_PROJECT. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in this stage. The build job runs the commands "go get -v ." and "go build -ldflags \"-X gitlab.com/olanguage/olang/version.version=$(git describe --tags) -X gitlab.com/olanguage/olang/version.commit=$(git rev-parse HEAD) -X gitlab.com/olanguage/olang/version.date=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\" -o olang". It stores the resulting binary "olang" as an artifact that expires after one week.
